chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 905 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4124/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asif Ali Sayal, advocate for the respondent 4. Mr. Zuhaib Ahmed, advocate holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the petitioner states that the finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition, therefore, it may be just and proper for petition to be disposed of with directions to the respondent department that assessment be finalized in accordance with law, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
